headlines.description: — Chuba Hubbard's first carry was about as bad as it gets.
headlines.shortLinkText: Defense shines, Panthers snap skid by beating Falcons 19-13

headlines.description: — Bills coach Sean McDermott isn’t exactly certain what Josh Allen meant about finding his inner Zen to shrug off a shaky start.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills wake up in second half to beat Dolphins 26-11

headlines.description: — Playing about 30 miles from where he grew up, Jimmy Garoppolo had no trouble making himself at home.
headlines.shortLinkText: Garoppolo leads way as 49ers beat Bears 33-22 to stop slide

headlines.description: — Ben Roethlisberger doesn't mind that Myles Garrett included him in his cemetery of sacked quarterbacks.
headlines.shortLinkText: Big Ben, Steelers survive kicking scare, bury Browns 15-10

headlines.description: — Boston Scott and Jordan Howard made the most of filling in for running back Miles Sanders and took advantage of Philadelphia dominating Detroit's defensive line.
headlines.shortLinkText: Eagles run for 4 TDs in 44-6 victory over winless Lions

headlines.description: — Tennessee safety Kevin Byard promised to do everything he could to redeem himself after a late pass interference call in the end zone Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Titans use late turnovers to pull off 34-31 OT win at Indy

events.name: Cincinnati Bengals at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Mike White caught himself listening to the crowd for a moment during his first NFL start.
headlines.shortLinkText: White steps in, leads Jets to wild 34-31 win over Bengals

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Houston Texans

headlines.description: — Perhaps the most stressful part for Los Angeles Rams coach Sean McVay was wondering if maybe he took Matthew Stafford out a bit too soon in a rout of the Houston Texans.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stafford has 3 TD passes as Rams roll past Texans 38-22

events.name: New England Patriots at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Adrian Phillips has been gone from the Los Angeles Chargers for nearly two seasons. He got his greatest revenge against his former team on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Phillips pick-six propels Patriots past Chargers 27-24

headlines.description: — With the possibility of their franchise quarterback returning soon, the Seattle Seahawks rallied around the idea of winning for Geno Smith.
headlines.shortLinkText: Seahawks snap losing string with 31-7 thumping of Jaguars

headlines.description: — Right when Denver's defense thought the game was over and its job was finished, back on the field it went.
headlines.shortLinkText: Broncos block 2 field goals in 17-10 win over Washington

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — When Saints quarterback Jameis Winston could no longer walk on his own, his New Orleans teammates rose up in dramatic fashion to knock off Tom Brady and the defending champs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saints overcome Winston injury, top Buccaneers 36-27

headlines.description: — Cooper Rush's first NFL start was a statement victory for the surging Dallas Cowboys with starting quarterback Dak Prescott stuck on the sideline.
headlines.shortLinkText: With Dak down, Cooper Rush passes Cowboys past Vikings 20-16
